channel.title: Abouts on Engineering Students' Society U of C
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Engineering Students' Society U of C
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2023 Engineering Students Society University of Calgary. All Rights Reserved

item.description:
Year & Major: 3rd Year Mechanical

A life goal of mine is to… Help my parents retire

My mantra is… Go with the flow

Current song on repeat If 6 was 9 - Jimi Hendrix
<!-- raw HTML omitted --> <!-- raw HTML omitted -->

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical

I get way too excited about… F1

A life goal of mine is to… Go on a world tour and explore new cultures

My favorite engineering memory is… Fresh air after exams season

Year & Major: 4th Year Software

I get way too excited about… Baldur’s Gate 3

A life goal of mine is to… Go solo camping one day

Current song on repeat TBH by PARTYNEXTDOOR

Year & Major: 3rd year Geomatics

Two truths and a lie I have 4 pet snakes, I did ballet when I was younger and I have never broken a bone.

Year & Major: 2nd Year Electrical

I get way too excited about… A yummy lunch or sweet treat!

A life goal of mine is to… Study abroad

Current song on repeat Ring of Past by Men I Trust

Year & Major: 3rd Year Risk Management & Polisci

A fun fact about myself is… I can sleep anywhere

My mantra is… If you did what you could, you did your best

Year & Major: 3rd Year Electrical

Current song on repeat Root of all evil by Daniel Caesar

A life goal of mine is… To learn how to integrate

I get way too excited about… Watching movies at the theatres

Year & Major: 3rd year Biomedica

A fun fact about myself is… I am a medical first responder!

Current song on repeat Opalite by Taylor Swift

My favorite engineering memory is… Going to CELC last year!

Year & Major: 2nd year Electrical

Current song on repeat Ripples by beabadobee

My favorite engineering memory is… All the stress and tears that occurred when making our boat for ENGG 200

The one thing you should know about me is that I am horribly addicted to Roblox and doomscrolling in any free time

Typical Sunday, playing Roblox

A life goal of mine is to eat a super rare fish, like a fish that was just discovered.
<!-- raw HTML omitted --> <!-- raw HTML omitted -->

The one thing you should know about me is that I HATE being non-chalant. I get way too excited about cheese (even tho i’m lactose), I will see cheese and want it, I will crave cheese, I will dream about cheese. I am made of Cheese. My cry-in-the-car song is literally ANY Daniel Caesar song!!!

This year, I really want to make new friends :)

I get way too excited about Redbull. My favourite thing about Calgary is that there’s way more flavours of Redbull. It’s my comfort food. It’s the only thing you can bribe me with and the only thing that keeps me awake past 5pm.

The one thing you should know about me is I have an unhealthy addiction to video games

I get way too excited about rediscovering songs that I used to spam on repeat

I get way too excited about THE DENVER NUGGETS AKA THE FUTURE 2026 LARRY O’BRIEN TROPHY-HOISTERS AND NIKOLA JOKIĆ FUTURE 2026 4X MVP

This year, I really want to make my little brother come visit and attend some classes with me

I get way too excited about musicals and discussing why mamma mia is the best one

Change my mind about old rock being better than new rock (Spoilers: you wont)

The one thing you should know about me is that I have a crazy sweet tooth and I will follow you anywhere if you offer me snacks or dessert!

I get way too excited about the weekend after a full week of classes

I get way too excited about carpool karaoke

My cry-in-the-car song is The View Between Villages by Noah Kahan

A life goal of mine is to spend a year travelling!

Year & Major: 2nd Year Civil

Current song on repeat End of August by Noah Kahan

A life goal of mine is… To backpack through Europe for a summer

I get way too excited about… Concerts and live music

Year & Major: 3rd Year Civil

Current song on repeat… Next Levels by King Geedorah

A life goal of mine is… To help promote mental health and create more support for students and young adults

Year & Major: 2nd year Chemical

A fun fact about myself is… I can eat 5 bowls of rice in one sitting

I get way too excited about… Free food

Year & Major: Internship year - Mech/Elec dual major

Current song on repeat Light of the Seven by Ramin Djawadi (GOT fans hmu)

I get way too excited about… Trying new hobbies

Year & Major: 2nd year Civil

A fun fact about myself is… I collect a lot of things but sometimes I think I’m just a hoarder

A life goal of mine is to… I’d love to backpack Europe and buy myself a pair of izzys, don’t know which one I want more

Year & Major: 2nd Year Chemical

I get way too excited about… Hockey

A fun fact about myself is… One of my favorite hobbies is wind surfing!

Current song on repeat Say my Name by Hozier

Year & Major: 3rd Year Electrical

My mantra is… Actions have consequences

I get way too excited about… New movies and music

Current song on repeat Back Outside by BNXN

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical

I get way to excited about… cars cars cars

a fun fact about myself is… I can bench press 260lbs (158 bw)

A life long goal of mine is… to survive in this economy

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical

I get way too excited about… C-dramas

A fun fact about myself is… I love dancing

Current sogn on repeat… Window Seat by Erykah Badu

Year & Major: 3nd Year Software

My cry-in-the-car song is… Seigfried by Frank Ocean.

My life goal is to… Make enough money to never work again and just work on fun projects at home.

Year & Major: 3rd Year Electrical

A fun fact about myself is… I’m double joined in my thumb

My favourite engineering memory is… spending BSD last year working on my 300 project (it’s only fun in retrospect..)

Year & Major: 3rd Year - Mechanical

I get way too excited about… Rock Climbing

AA fun fact about myself is… I have my pilots license

Current song on repeat… King for a Day by Pierce the Veil

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical

A life goal of mine is to… hike to Machu Picchu

The most spontaneous thing I’ve done is… Go across Europe for a summer

Year & Major: 3rd Year Chemical/Business

A life long goal of mine is to… Work overseas

My mantra is… Dance like no one’s watching

I egt wat too excited about… Spikeball!

Year & Major: 3rd Year Mechanical

I get way too excited about… Excel

My mantra is… Excel Excel Excel

Two truths and a lie… I love excel, I dislike Google Sheets, I hate pivot tables

Year & Major: 3rd Year Electrical

I get way to excited about… Concerts

A current song on repaet… Thinking Bout You by Ariana Grande

My Mantra is… It’s not over till it’s over

Year & Major: 5th Year Mechanical

my favourite engineering memory is… Surviving thermo 2. I don’t talk about it, but I did come out the other side with a deep personal grudge against the Carnot Cycle.

Year & Major: 3rd Year Mechanical

TA fun fact about myself… I love ranch

I get way too excited about… Ranch dressing

Current song on repeat… Shine a Little Light by The Black Keys

Year & Major: 2nd Year Mechanical

I get way to excited about… cars cars cars

a fun fact about myself is… I can bench press 260lbs (158 bw)

A life long goal of mine is… to survive in this economy

item.title: 2025-2026 Council
item.description: The Engineering Students’ Society Council is a group of student volunteers dedicated to the improvement of your time at the Schulich School of Engineering. We are a diverse group of students just like you, doing our best to be leaders for the engineering community here at the UofC. Our Board of Directors consists of the ESS President, 8 portfolio executives, 9 departmental representatives elected by you, and 10 first year representatives. Alongside our commissioners, we advocate on behalf of engineering students to the school, host social and professional events, and provide an array of services aimed at making your time at Schulich enjoyable!

item.title: ESS Membership
item.description: Support the Engineering Students’ Society by becoming a member today! The Engineering Students’ Society works hard to enrich the engineering student experience for all engineering students by hosting a variety of academic, professional, and social events throughout the year. Members will enjoy perks such as discounted events, merchandise discounts, partner discounts, and early access to new ESS products and services.

item.title: Public Documents
item.description: Public documents including our budget, post-activity reports, election information, and more are available on our public Google Drive folder. In addition, the official ESS consititution can be seen below, which contains the ideals, rules, and regulations that the society governs by.
